name: 驱魔录·暗黑水墨
prompt_keywords: Chinese dark ink-wash realistic manga style, fusion of traditional Chinese ink painting texture, Japanese dark manga high-contrast dramatic lighting, Western Gothic silhouette aesthetics, rough bold ink-bleed linework, low-saturation cold-tone base with high-saturation crimson and gold accents
